methods.label: Proven / 已证明
methods.body: Wall count, Plant Pod count, visit records, timestamps, photos, replacement records and audit events.

methods.label: Estimated / 估算
methods.body: Water saving, service miles avoided, wellness reach and CO2e proxy are marked as estimates with method notes.

methods.label: Impact indicators / 影响指标
methods.body: Xponge health-safety, employee experience and green brand value are tracked as impact indicators with source evidence and claim boundaries.

methods.label: Robotics-ready evidence / 机器人就绪证据
methods.body: Robot patrol, refill, dosing and photo-proof records are treated as future operational evidence and require pilot validation before external claims.

methods.label: Not claimed / 不主张
methods.body: Carbon credits, carbon neutrality, formal air purification guarantees and certified WELL/LEED points are not claimed unless independently certified.

methods.label: Assurance boundary / 鉴证边界
methods.body: DR FOREST provides supplier evidence for client reporting; independent assurance remains with the client, auditor or qualified assurance provider.

ledger.label: Environmental
ledger.template: {{greenArea}} m2 live green wall area, {{waterSaved}} L/mo water-saving estimate, Plant Pod replacement traceability.

ledger.label: Social
ledger.template: {{staffReach}} monthly staff and visitor touchpoints supported by visible biophilic space and stable presentation quality.

ledger.label: Health and brand impact
ledger.template: Xponge substrate logs, pest/disease records, staff pulse and green brand touchpoint proof can support Social and brand-facing ESG narratives.

ledger.label: Robotic care readiness
ledger.template: Robot-ready module interfaces, patrol logs and automated proof can increase evidence frequency and support lower-intervention FM operations after pilot validation.

ledger.label: Governance
ledger.template: Each visit links work orders, photos, DR FOREST findings, manual actions and report method notes.

proofPack.label: Source evidence chain
proofPack.standard: Photo, timestamp, site, asset ID, technician and linked work order
proofPack.acceptedBy: Client ESG team, FM team and report preparer
proofPack.body: Every metric must point back to raw operational evidence rather than a standalone marketing statement.

proofPack.label: Metric method note
proofPack.standard: Measured vs estimated classification, formula, assumptions and reporting period
proofPack.body: The pack separates measured facts from estimates, so the client can decide what enters formal disclosure.

proofPack.label: Claims boundary
proofPack.standard: No carbon credit, carbon neutral, certified WELL/LEED or medical air-quality claim without external evidence
proofPack.body: This protects DR FOREST and clients from overstated ESG claims.

proofPack.label: Assurance handoff
proofPack.standard: Optional third-party assurance package export with evidence index
proofPack.body: DR FOREST can provide an audit-ready file, but third-party assurance is a separate engagement.

proofPack.label: Xponge health-safety evidence
proofPack.standard: Substrate record, pest/disease log, chemical intervention approval and no-soil proof
proofPack.acceptedBy: FM, workplace, ESG or hygiene reviewer
proofPack.body: The pack shows how fewer disease or pest events can reduce maintenance risk and routine chemical intervention in indoor FM environments.

proofPack.label: Workplace and brand impact evidence
proofPack.standard: Staff or visitor pulse method, touchpoint map, approved photos and claim boundary
proofPack.acceptedBy: HR, brand, ESG or property marketing reviewer
proofPack.body: Employee experience and green brand value can be recognized when the survey method, touchpoint logic and photo approval are visible.

proofPack.label: Robotic care readiness evidence
proofPack.standard: Robot route, module interface, photo proof, refill log, dosing log, leak safety and human escalation boundary
proofPack.acceptedBy: FM, safety, ESG and procurement reviewer
proofPack.body: Robotic care evidence can support future ESG and FM efficiency narratives only after controlled site pilots validate safety and reliability.

frameworkMapping.label: Supplier evidence for listed-company ESG disclosure
frameworkMapping.proof: Site-level green asset records, service proof, climate-related method notes and governance trace.

frameworkMapping.label: Governance, metrics and risk-management inputs
frameworkMapping.proof: Risk queue, method notes, measured-vs-estimated labels and climate-adjacent operational indicators.

frameworkMapping.label: Impact and stakeholder-facing narrative support
frameworkMapping.proof: Environmental, social and governance ledger entries with source records.

frameworkMapping.label: Occupant experience support only
frameworkMapping.proof: Staff or visitor pulse, space comfort notes and biophilic design evidence can support wellbeing narratives without claiming WELL points.

frameworkMapping.label: Operational efficiency support only
frameworkMapping.proof: Robot patrol logs, refill records and exception handoffs can support service-frequency and route-efficiency analysis after pilot validation.

frameworkMapping.label: Carbon-adjacent inputs only
frameworkMapping.proof: CO2e proxy remains a narrative estimate until the client or qualified advisor validates inventory boundaries.

claimControls.label: Allowed: measured asset facts
claimControls.body: Wall area, asset count, Plant Pod count, visit records, replacement records and approved photos can be stated as supplier evidence.

claimControls.label: Allowed with method note: estimates
claimControls.body: Water saving, service miles avoided, wellness reach and CO2e proxy can be shown when formula, assumptions and period are visible.

claimControls.label: Allowed with evidence: impact indicators
claimControls.body: Xponge low-intervention records, staff pulse results and green brand touchpoint scores can be shown when raw evidence, method and client approval are attached.

claimControls.label: Allowed as roadmap: robotics-ready care
claimControls.body: Robotic patrol, refill and dosing should be presented as a roadmap and pilot-ready architecture until site validation exists.

claimControls.label: Blocked without certification
claimControls.body: Do not claim official ESG certification, carbon credits, carbon neutrality, verified Scope 3 reduction or WELL/LEED points without external certification.

claimControls.label: Investor demo language
claimControls.body: Use: audit-ready ESG evidence package that supports client reporting. Avoid: official ESG certificate.
